_note: Curated tier for gen_site_data.py — the ONE place stable, not-cleanly-code-derivable site facts live, so sites stop scattering them. The DERIVED tier (cc_version, profile/parser counts, parser names) is read from code by the generator and is NOT here. Update this only when an architectural figure or a sibling product's version genuinely changes; the generator + CI enforce the derived numbers.
backend_count_note: 5 hardware-validated flash backends (esptool, qflipper, adb, sd, rtl8720). flash_engine._backends also registers 3 phase-3 scaffolds (dfu, uf2, nrf_dfu) that are argv-tested but board-validation-pending — excluded from the count until one graduates. Source: src/core/flash_engine.py FlashEngine._backends.
interface_count_note: desktop GUI, headless/localhost web, CLI, and the Cyber Controller broadcast/coordination surface. Source: README 'one screen' / the 4 interfaces line.
products_note: Verified 2026-07-09 from each repo (UF pyproject 1.4.0, HMG 1.3.4, DMS CHANGELOG 1.0.0, Catalyst 4.0.3, Tag Studio version.json 0.3.1). cyber_controller is injected from the DERIVED cc_version at generate time, not stored here. FUTURE: a cross-repo generator could read each product's version file directly to remove even this curation.
